metadata.title: Laravelcamp
metadata.description: A modern Arabic-first learning platform for developers — hands-on courses, guided tracks and interactive exercises

footer.about: A modern Arabic-first learning platform offering hands-on programming courses at world-class quality, from top instructors, at a symbolic price.
footer.newsletterText: The latest courses and articles in your inbox, weekly.

trackDetails.subtitle: Learn to code websites using {title}
trackDetails.paragraph1: Front end web development involves web design and building the websites people use every day. It is a comprehensive skill set used by nearly every company in the world that needs a website to communicate with its customers.
trackDetails.paragraph2: In this track you will learn how to build beautiful, interactive websites by mastering the fundamentals of HTML, CSS and JavaScript — the three languages all modern websites are built on. By the end you will have every skill required to build your own websites or start your career.
trackDetails.salary: The average entry-level salary for the technologies covered in this track is around $51,000 per year.
trackDetails.companies: Companies that regularly use these technologies include: Google, Facebook, Yahoo, eBay and Amazon

techdegree.aboutText: Learn to build web pages with HTML and CSS, the basic building blocks of web development. HTML is a standard set of tags that tell the browser how your page content is structured, and CSS defines how that content looks. Whether you are coding for fun or planning a career in web development, HTML and CSS are the perfect place to start.
techdegree.downloadText: Downloading videos is a feature of the upgraded courses subscription. Want access?

about.heroTitle: Building a generation of professional Arab developers
about.heroText: A modern Arabic-first learning platform — our goal is to put programming within everyone's reach, with practical content and world-class quality.
about.companyTitle: We help businesses grow with promising services
about.experienceTitle: More than 22 years of experience in digital technology solutions
about.story: Laravelcamp was founded to make access to technology easier through affordable Arabic tech education. Over the past decade we taught more than 1.2 million people how to code and design, and today we are the platform of choice for thousands of students, schools and organizations around the world.
about.joinText: We work hard to craft the best learning experience ever, and we are always looking for great people who share that vision.
